See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 25641 => 'Kampala', 25643 => 'Jinja', 25645 => 'Mbale', 25646 => 'Mityana', 256464 => 'Mubende', 256465 => 'Masindi', 256471 => 'Gulu', 256473 => 'Lira', 256476 => 'Arua', 256481 => 'Masaka', 256483 => 'Fort Portal', 256485 => 'Mbarara', 256486 => 'Kabale/Rukungiri/Kisoro', ];
